subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I know not by what remembrance I may raise aloft the banners of Thy guidance for the sincere among Thy servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی لم ادر بای ذکر ارفع اعلام هدایتک للمخلصین من عبادک ان
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for spiritual recognition
